classroom.title: Technology that supports learning - not distracts from it.
classroom.intro: Every classroom is designed for clarity, curiosity, and understanding.
classroom.drawerIntro: Each classroom blends calm design, age-appropriate technology, and teacher-led structure so students can stay focused, participate confidently, and build strong learning habits every day.
drawerPoints: Clear front-of-room teaching visibility
Interactive lessons with guided device use
Flexible layouts for independent and group work
Supportive spaces for different learning needs

items.title: Focused Learning Zones
items.text: Seating, lighting, and classroom flow are planned to reduce distraction and help students stay attentive during both instruction and hands-on work.

items.title: Guided Digital Integration
items.text: Technology is introduced with purpose, giving students access to interactive tools and personal devices without overwhelming the learning experience.

earlyDevelopment.title: Learning begins with touch, movement, and discovery
earlyDevelopment.intro: Sand, water, textures, and guided activities support balance, coordination, focus, and early motor skill development.
earlyDevelopment.drawerIntro: Our early development spaces are built for safe sensory exploration, movement, and repetition so younger children can strengthen coordination, curiosity, and confidence through play-based routines.
drawerPoints: Mess-friendly zones for hands-on exploration
Movement activities that improve balance and control
Sensory materials that build attention and curiosity
Teacher-guided play with clear developmental goals

items.title: Sensory Discovery Areas
items.text: Children explore texture, sound, and movement in calming spaces that encourage experimentation while supporting early concentration and self-regulation.

items.title: Water And Texture Play
items.text: Practical activities with water, sand, and tactile materials help develop grip strength, coordination, and confidence through joyful repetition.

innovationLabs.title: Turning ideas into real-world creation
innovationLabs.intro: Hands-on environments where students build, code, and explore future technologies.
innovationLabs.drawerIntro: Innovation labs give students space to test ideas, build prototypes, and see how design, coding, and problem-solving connect to real-world challenges.
innovationLabs.metricLabel: more practical learning exposure than 80% schools
drawerPoints: Project-based STEM challenges
Coding and robotics for applied thinking
Experiment-first learning with teacher support
Real materials, tools, and prototype workflows

items.title: Build And Test Stations
items.text: Students move beyond theory by designing, assembling, and improving working models in a space that rewards experimentation and iteration.

items.title: Coding And Robotics
items.text: Structured digital making activities help students understand logic, teamwork, and systems thinking through practical, visible outcomes.

arts.title: A happy place where children create, imagine, and express themselves
arts.intro: Students explore color, texture, craft, and design in a warm studio space that builds confidence and creativity.
arts.drawerIntro: Creative studios invite students to explore ideas with their hands, experiment with different materials, and build confidence by turning imagination into visible work.
arts.metricLabel: creative experiences in one inspiring space
drawerPoints: Dedicated zones for painting, craft, and making
Material-rich activities that build fine motor control
Open-ended prompts that encourage originality
Display-ready work that boosts confidence

items.title: Studio Making Tables
items.text: Children work with paper, paint, fabric, and craft materials in a welcoming environment designed for experimentation and self-expression.

items.title: Creative Process Display
items.text: The studio celebrates both finished pieces and the process behind them, helping students feel proud of their ideas and effort.

reverseEngineering.title: Children learn how things work by trying with their own hands
reverseEngineering.intro: Hands-on labs help students become curious, confident, and capable through guided real-world activities.
reverseEngineering.drawerIntro: These exploration rooms help students understand systems by taking things apart, rebuilding them, and learning the practical logic behind tools, materials, and everyday mechanisms.
drawerPoints: Safe introductions to real tools and materials
Step-by-step reverse engineering activities
Basic electrical and plumbing awareness
Problem-solving through practical making

items.title: Practical Tool Learning
items.text: Students build comfort with measuring, assembling, and working carefully with guided tools that make abstract concepts easier to understand.

items.title: Systems And Mechanisms
items.text: By opening, observing, and rebuilding simple structures, learners begin to see how design decisions affect function in the real world.

food.title: Healthy habits shaped through real hands-on experience
food.intro: Children explore cooking basics, nutrition, cleanliness, responsibility, and healthy habits through guided practical learning.
food.drawerIntro: Food science and life skills sessions turn everyday routines into meaningful learning, helping children understand healthy choices, responsibility, and practical independence.
drawerPoints: Simple cooking tasks with guided supervision
Food awareness linked to health and wellbeing
Cleanliness habits built into every activity
Responsibility and teamwork through shared routines

items.title: Cooking And Preparation Basics
items.text: Children learn simple food preparation routines that strengthen sequencing, responsibility, and practical confidence in a safe environment.

items.title: Nutrition And Healthy Habits
items.text: Lessons connect ingredients, cleanliness, and healthy choices so students understand the daily habits that support long-term wellbeing.

auditoriumHall.title: A welcoming stage where children learn to speak with confidence
auditoriumHall.intro: A warm performance space for storytelling, dramatics, and public speaking.
auditoriumHall.drawerIntro: The auditorium gives children a supportive setting to perform, express ideas clearly, and build confidence in front of others through regular stage-based activities.
drawerPoints: Dedicated stage area for school performances
Speaking practice in a supportive environment
Creative expression through dramatics and storytelling
Confidence building through regular audience interaction

items.title: Stage Performance Area
items.text: Children participate in storytelling, skits, and performances that help them express ideas clearly and confidently.

items.title: Public Speaking Platform
items.text: Structured speaking opportunities help students improve voice, presence, and comfort while addressing a group.

indoorSportsHall.title: An active indoor space for movement, agility, and motor skill growth
indoorSportsHall.intro: A versatile hall designed for indoor sports, movement practice, and physical development.
indoorSportsHall.drawerIntro: The indoor sports hall supports energetic movement in a safe all-weather setting where children can strengthen agility, coordination, balance, and gross motor skills.
drawerPoints: All-weather space for guided physical activity
Movement drills that improve balance and agility
Games that strengthen gross motor control
Structured routines for active learning and coordination

items.title: Versatile Activity Floor
items.text: Open indoor space allows children to move freely through games, drills, and physical skill-building sessions.

items.title: Motor Skill Training
items.text: Age-appropriate activities help develop balance, speed, coordination, and physical confidence.

activityRooms.title: Flexible rooms for play, movement, and group activities
activityRooms.intro: Eight rumpus and sports activity rooms designed for fun, imagination, and collaboration.
activityRooms.drawerIntro: These activity rooms give children flexible indoor spaces for energetic play, structured sessions, and collaborative experiences that support both creativity and physical development.
drawerPoints: Multiple rooms for age-specific activity planning
Safe spaces for imaginative and active play
Indoor options for group games and collaboration
Flexible layouts for movement and learning sessions

items.title: Rumpus Play Rooms
items.text: Children enjoy active indoor play in secure rooms that encourage imagination, exploration, and teamwork.

items.title: Sports Activity Spaces
items.text: Dedicated rooms support guided physical activities that build coordination, participation, and confidence.

outdoorSports.title: Expansive outdoor areas for play, fitness, and athletic growth
outdoorSports.intro: Open play zones, sports fields, and a running track support active learning every day.
outdoorSports.drawerIntro: Outdoor facilities give children room to run, play, compete, and build stamina through team sports, free movement, and structured athletic activities.
drawerPoints: Secure open-air play zones for daily activity
Sports grounds for team games and fitness drills
Track space for running and endurance building
Large areas that support energetic, social play

items.title: Outdoor Play Zones
items.text: Children enjoy spacious and secure outdoor areas designed for movement, social interaction, and imaginative play.

items.title: Fields And Running Track
items.text: Sports grounds and track facilities help students build stamina, teamwork, and athletic confidence.

wellbeingFitness.title: Child-friendly spaces that support calm minds and healthy bodies
wellbeingFitness.intro: Dedicated areas for wellbeing, mindfulness, and physical fitness development.
wellbeingFitness.drawerIntro: These spaces are designed to support emotional wellbeing, self-awareness, and healthy physical development through calm routines, movement, and guided fitness activities.
drawerPoints: Calm spaces that support emotional regulation
Child-friendly routines for mindfulness and focus
Fitness activities that promote healthy development
Balanced environments for movement and wellbeing

items.title: Mindfulness And Wellbeing Areas
items.text: Quiet, child-friendly environments help students slow down, reset, and strengthen emotional awareness.

items.title: Fitness Development Spaces
items.text: Guided physical routines help children build strength, coordination, and healthy movement habits.

karate.title: A disciplined space where children build focus, balance, and self-confidence
karate.intro: Structured karate sessions help children grow stronger, calmer, and more confident.
karate.drawerIntro: Karate training gives children a focused environment to develop discipline, coordination, body control, and respect through consistent guided practice.
drawerPoints: Guided karate practice with age-appropriate instruction
Movement routines that improve balance and control
Discipline-building activities with clear structure
Confidence growth through steady personal progress

items.title: Structured Training Sessions
items.text: Children follow clear routines that strengthen discipline, concentration, and body awareness in a supportive setting.

items.title: Confidence Through Movement
items.text: Karate practice helps students build physical control, resilience, and self-belief step by step.

football.title: An energetic field where children learn teamwork, stamina, and game spirit
football.intro: Football sessions build fitness, coordination, teamwork, and confidence through active play.
football.drawerIntro: The football ground gives children an exciting team environment where they can develop endurance, coordination, strategy, and sportsmanship through guided play.
drawerPoints: Large field space for active team play
Drills that improve speed, control, and coordination
Shared play that builds teamwork and communication
Fitness development through energetic outdoor movement

items.title: Team Play And Coordination
items.text: Children learn to move, pass, and play together while building social confidence and game understanding.

items.title: Outdoor Fitness And Stamina
items.text: Football activities support endurance, agility, and healthy physical development through joyful movement.

kidsPoolSwimming.title: Safe water spaces where children grow in confidence
kidsPoolSwimming.intro: Shallow pool play and supervised swimming help children build comfort, coordination, and water safety.
kidsPoolSwimming.drawerIntro: Our child-friendly pool areas introduce water in a calm and supervised way, helping students enjoy movement, learn basic swimming habits, and grow more confident around water.
drawerPoints: Shallow pool space designed for young learners
Supervised swimming practice with guided routines
Water safety habits introduced early
Confidence building through calm step-by-step learning

items.title: Kids Pool Play
items.text: A child-friendly shallow pool gives young learners a safe start with water play, comfort, and confidence building.

items.title: Supervised Swimming
items.text: Guided swimming sessions help children strengthen coordination, discipline, and essential water safety awareness.

islamicGardenNatureLearning.title: Nature-rich spaces that connect learning with reflection
islamicGardenNatureLearning.intro: Qur'anic plants and outdoor learning areas help children grow with care, gratitude, and environmental awareness.
islamicGardenNatureLearning.drawerIntro: These living learning spaces invite children to observe nature, explore Qur'anic plants, and develop respect for the environment through calm outdoor experiences.
drawerPoints: Garden spaces featuring Qur'anic plants
Outdoor learning that links faith and nature
Simple sustainability lessons through observation
Reflection areas that encourage calm thinking

items.title: Qur'anic Plants Garden
items.text: Children explore meaningful plants in a peaceful setting that connects knowledge, reflection, and appreciation of nature.

items.title: Nature Learning Areas
items.text: Outdoor spaces support environmental learning, curiosity, and a sense of care for the world around them.

prayerRoomMosque.title: A peaceful space for prayer, values, and reflection
prayerRoomMosque.intro: A serene environment where children experience prayer, calm reflection, and value-based growth.
prayerRoomMosque.drawerIntro: The prayer room offers a respectful setting where students can pause, reflect, and strengthen spiritual habits in an Islamic environment rooted in shared values.
drawerPoints: Quiet space for prayer and reflection
Daily routines that support spiritual growth
Value-based learning in a calm setting
An environment that reinforces respect and mindfulness

items.title: Quiet Reflection Area
items.text: A calm dedicated space helps children slow down, reflect, and develop peaceful daily habits.

items.title: Islamic Values Environment
items.text: Shared routines and guided practice support spiritual development, discipline, and respectful conduct.

smartTransportSafeConnectivity.title: Safe school journeys and simple peace of mind for parents
smartTransportSafeConnectivity.intro: GPS-tracked transport and secure communication systems help children travel safely while parents stay informed.
smartTransportSafeConnectivity.drawerIntro: Our transport and communication systems are designed to support both students and parents, combining safe travel, clear updates, and dependable digital coordination.
drawerPoints: GPS-enabled school transport for safer travel
Clear parent communication from pickup to drop-off
Secure digital systems that support coordination
A dependable school-home connection for daily peace of mind

items.title: Safe School Transport
items.text: Reliable school transport helps children travel comfortably and safely as part of a well-managed school day.

items.title: Connected Parents
items.text: Tracking and communication tools keep parents informed and reassured throughout the journey.
